## Design language: ABRID (DL-15)

**Everything is connected.** Amazigh: Connection and pathways.

Status: candidate. Occasions: framework decks, portfolio reviews, strategy workshops.

### Design laws

- Relationships first
- Structure reveals insight
- Connections are explicit
- Frameworks simplify complexity
- Navigation through ideas

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | question-first |
| density | operational |
| annotation_policy | guided |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | single |
| decision_style | options |
| reading_time | session |
| charts_per_page | 2 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| ink | `#0E3A2C` |
| body | `#3E4C46` |
| hairline | `#C9D2CC` |
| gridline | `#E5E7E2` |
| primary | `#197A56` |
| muted | `#A7C4B5` |
| positive | `#197A56` |
| negative | `#9E2B25` |

### Fonts

- display: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 700
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: false
